emerging.title: UNC5221 Ivanti Connect Secure exploitation, techniques outside existing BAS coverage
emerging.summary: UNC5221 actively exploiting Ivanti Connect Secure CVE-2025-22457. Post-exploitation includes novel credential harvesting and C2 techniques not currently mapped to any BreachForge scenario.
reasons: Threat actor not currently modelled in BreachForge: UNC5221
Techniques not covered by any existing BAS scenario and trending: T1071.004, T1572

emerging.title: Cl0p MOVEit-style file transfer exploitation, supply chain variant
emerging.summary: Cl0p group using SQL injection against managed file transfer platforms. Technique TTP combination differs from existing S7 supply chain scenario, targets MFT appliances rather than CI/CD pipelines.
reasons: Techniques not covered by any existing BAS scenario: T1048.002 (Exfil over Alt Protocol), T1567.002 (Exfil to Code Repository)

emerging.title: Midnight Blizzard credential spray against on-premises Exchange, new actor
emerging.summary: Midnight Blizzard (NOBELIUM) credential spray campaigns against on-premises Exchange servers. Actor is related to APT29 but operates with distinct TTP fingerprint not yet modelled separately in BreachForge.
reasons: Threat actor not currently modelled in BreachForge: Midnight Blizzard
Techniques not covered by any existing BAS scenario: T1213.002 (Data from Information Repositories: Sharepoint)
